title: Bike Touring Vlog - Greece - Olympia to Olympus  7-9-2010 4/4

transcript.text: Got the money out of the supermarket and then I asked the ladies at the supermarket I'm like can
Can a bike ride on the superhighway because I looked on my map and the only way really to get
To olympus was on the superhighway otherwise I would have had to gone up in the mountains and
Like zigzag around and it would have been taking forever so they're like of course highway bicycle
Of course so I was like I'll go down there anyway so I get on the highway and there's no sign on
The highway that says you can't ride bikes on so I get on the highway and I ride the highway you
Know and I pass I get to a checkpoint and the guy's like waves me down to stop so I'm like what and
He's like you have to ask a cop to escort you through the valley that's up ahead that's only
Eight miles long and I was like all right he's just like and I'm like well why don't I and I saw a
Train track there and I'm like well I'll just take the train that's better so I was like all right
Yeah just ask him where the station is so I ride up but there's no station anywhere so I'm like fuck
It I'll just ride my bike through the valley so I ride my bike through the valley and I saw a couple
Of cops like um escorting uh some big trucks through and they didn't pull me over and I went
Through and then I saw another checkpoint and they just waved me through you know and so I was like
Cool in greece you can ride bikes on the superhighway so then I ride up to uh I start zigzagging up the
Mountain on the side of an olympus and I um and I uh stayed at the uh the uh hostel no no I went to the
Refuge there and I thought it was a hostel refuge for some reason and they're like oh there's no
Room so I was like all right well can I just camp here so they let me camp for free so that was cool
And you know the flu was kind of against the bear so I camped there and it was cool because at night
I got to see the whole lights and I could see how the how the the land you know from the peninsula kind
Of curved over back over and I saw the lights of thessaloniki off in the distance it's cool and I filmed
It and the next day I rode up to lock my bike at the other base and then I hiked up all the way to
The top of the mountain to the uh to the um um the highest um hostel and I was the only person staying
There the first night and then I got up the next morning and it was like really really really like
Rainy like wet and rainy and everything and I was like huh and then the guy's like yeah you can't
Climb mountain you can't climb in the wetness yeah I think he wanted to keep me there another
Day to make more money on me but um so I was like what should I do so I decided to stay another day
So I went back to bed again and I got up because I was kind of tired you know because I had three hard
Days in a row before that or was it two well no no three if you would include the hiking
And then it had cleared up it was totally funky in the morning but then by 10 it cleared up and it was
Clear the whole day all the way until like sunset pretty much but I hiked a little bit and then I
Hiked out you know but I stayed there two days and the food's really expensive I ended up paying 80
Euros but um anyways I get up the next morning to hike it so I hiked up to the top of it and I tried
To hike up the the steep part but I was like it was like rock climbing you know with these shoes
Which are like plastic you know like slippery so I was like fuck that so then I went around and
Then I actually was able to climb the mountain from the other end not that mountain because it
Would have I thought it would probably include some more of that rock climbing so I didn't want to
Deal with that so I went out and climbed the other mountain even though it was three it was only three
Meters lower though but it was totally foggy even though at like seven in the morning it wasn't foggy
And I could have gotten up at four but I didn't I got up it later so yeah when I filmed it I couldn't
Get the view of the whole everything but I got enough of whole everything view you know which I think I
Filmed too from the day before so um and then I hiked down and it's really pretty my olympus is
Really pretty I have the films on the other films but it's really pretty really intense really steep
Beautiful mountain foggy I mean it's every it's everything you could imagine so then I rode all the
Way down to the uh the beach and the beach this beach there and greece is amazing maybe I'll include
That when I talk about greece but uh it was like packed with people without a mosquito it was packed
With people who were so freaking decked out with their camping they had um they had beds like
Wooden framed beds in their tents their big ass tents with like I think they even had like rocks
You know in their campsites oh shit they are mosquitoes at least there's not many um
Refrigerators microwave ovens televisions like all these people and it was like tons of people
Totally packed like a town it was like some kind of like indian and gypsy come some kind of like
Village right on the beach really nice beach too and they're playing volleyball and everything
And they got only charged me five years camp there and then I tried to do the internet but I wasn't allowed
To like upload or even go into like facebook or anything like that because I had some comments
On facebook so I was like pretty much useless to me um you know I couldn't comment on like youtube
Videos or whatever so I just went to bed and then I got up this morning and I started rolling at 10 30
This morning and I had a breakfast at the restaurant there at the other campsite which I
Shouldn't have done because they had they had a store there and I could have gotten food for a lot
Cheaper um but I had the breakfast so I spent a lot of money today on food because then I rode in
And I was riding down the highway and I only had like 40 kilometers to go before thessaloniki
And then I got to it was like one more checkpoint and the guy's like pulls me over and he's like no
Bikes and I was like and he's like yeah wait here so they made me wait there just like in croatia
For like an hour until these cops come and then these cops come and they're like yeah
You know the fine for riding on the highway is 200 euro and I was like I was like well I've been
Riding on the highway since larissa and I passed through two checkpoints and they just waved me
Through you know he's like what checkpoint I'm like this one and that one and he's like oh well I'll
Have to talk to them and tell them not to you know do that and I was like so anyways they didn't charge
Me luckily and uh they just let me leave so I left on the frontage road but I had to go way around
Huge detour and um into thessaloniki because I decided to go into thessaloniki instead of bypass
Thessaloniki which had been a lot faster and just go head straight to the sophia but um I was
Absolutely convinced that I had broken my rear axle because I was riding up the hill and I could hear
Like popping like pop and I felt like I felt like there was a lot of drag also in my rear wheel and
There was a lot of play so I go into a bike shop dude and I'm like yeah dude I broke my axle here's
The new axle because I have an extra axle and they open it up and they're like your axle's not broken
So and like that play is play just because it's an old wheel and I think they tightened it a little
Bit but you can't really tighten it that much it doesn't really matter because the the gears work
Fine and I mean I should have known the axle wasn't broken because when the axle broke in germany
My gears were snapping changing all over the place and my gears were still working fine so I don't know
What that popping crap was maybe it's from my cranks getting bad but I wiggled my cranks and they're
Tight and there was no popping there's nothing going on today so I don't know what the hell was
The deal the other day on the mountain but anyways that was good to know I mean I'm glad that that
Weights off mine because I was convinced that I had broken my axle so now I know that I haven't
Broken my axle but uh but then I left and I went into this restaurant and there's this girl in there
And I'm like yeah you have food and she's like oh wait and she disappears and I was like I thought
She's gonna say like wait I'll get you the menu so she's in there for like five minutes I'm like
What so I peeked in and she's like oh yeah wait so she just like got me food she like decided to just
Choose what to get so then she gives me this little like sandwich it's like like ham and cheese
Sandwich for like 250 2 euro 50 and then she gives me another one like and I didn't even ask for
Another one but then I got this 5 euro 50 drink which was really good but it's expensive so I ended up
Paying like 10 euro 50 and they didn't even have internet there they were like internet was broken
And then at the bike shop I asked if they had internet and they were like not allowed to use
Internet so then I went into another place I was like do you have internet this fast food place and
They didn't but but I ended up getting a hamburger and a couple of sodas there it was so hot today
That I was like literally like dehydrated no matter how much water I was drinking and I just like
Wanted to get soda like today I was jonesing the last few days since I've been kind of out of
Shape again from not touring I'm like jonesing for like you know powerade and gatorade which I got
The other day it's so good gatorade is so good when it's hot out you know cold gatorade and anyways
The soda pop too so I got me a couple sodas and I got it you know some food there and I think that's
And then I got a big old thing of like grapes which is only a euro 50 I could be traveling so cheap
If I'm if I'm eating like supermarket food if I go in and I bag I buy canned tuna
I buy a loaf of bread I buy the vegetables or the fruit and I just feed myself that way instead of
Going to the restaurants because I got I spent 10 euro 50 at the restaurant I spent 13 euro 50 at
The restaurant this morning so that's 23 euro 50 and then like another like 7 euro at the fast food
Place so I spent like 30 euro today on food when I could have spent probably like 15 euro on the same
Amount of food so um I need to get I'm just not into the mode of bike touring because I've been
Out so long from all of the bullshit with the problems with the bike and stuff and then all
The tour the sightseeing and grease but I'm happy because I've got fourteen thousand dollars of credit
On like four credit cards so and I'm not afraid to spend that I want to have fun on this tour so
Um and I'll be able to pay that crap off anyway so so um I rode out of thessaloniki whoa I'm almost
Out of time and then I rode up to the top of this pass it just went straight up so now I'm at 18 1900
Feet and there's like I've seen like one mosquito and it's breezy because last night it was so hot and
Humid I was sweating my balls off I don't like camping out and right next to the ocean at this latitude 42
Degrees um this is the ship right here so I'm happy I feel clean and everything so anyways that's it
Okay ciao
